case_title: ANDRE D JORDAN VS. BARNABY O. PAYNE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED NOV-14-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAYNE, BARNABY O.
